_comment: Example multi-board collector manifest. Copy to tools/boards.json and edit for your
bench. Each node has a `protocol`: nobro_report (read a NOBRO_* struct over J-Link),
jsonl_bridge (START/STOP JSONL app), serial_regex (match any app's output), vision
(camera frame analytics), or sim (synthetic node). Replace the placeholder ports with
your own serial ports (e.g. COM3 on Windows, /dev/ttyUSB0 on Linux). `tool_python`
defaults to `python3`; set it only if a node needs a specific interpreter.

boards.name: imu_board
boards.kind: development board / IMU sensor node (NOBRO report over J-Link)

boards.name: any_app
boards.kind: any board whose firmware prints a recognizable banner

boards.name: sim_relay
boards.kind: simulated relay + temperature node (no hardware needed)
